findings.location: s4 (コンポーネント定義の上書き)
findings.description: The source includes the original `idGenerator` component XML code block (showing `nablarch.common.idgenerator.TableIdGenerator` with properties `tableName=ID_GENERATE`, `idColumnName=ID`, `noColumnName=NO`) as an example of how to identify the target component name from the default configuration. The knowledge file omits this XML and only provides the replacement XML, losing the paired before/after context.
findings.source_evidence: Source section '同名のコンポーネントを定義する': `<component name="idGenerator" class="nablarch.common.idgenerator.TableIdGenerator"><property name="tableName" value="ID_GENERATE" />...`

findings.description: The index title for s1 is 'カスタマイズのパターン', but the section content also covers '設定ファイルの構成' (the full explanation of デフォルトコンフィグレーション jar structure and PJ成果物). The title does not reflect the full scope of the section's content.
findings.source_evidence: Source has a dedicated h2 section '設定ファイルの構成' that is merged into s1 along with 'カスタマイズのパターン'.
